nasb.text: In the early morning, while it was still dark, Jesus got up, left the house, and went away to a secluded place, and was praying there.

esv.text: And rising very early in the morning, while it was still dark, he departed and went out to a desolate place, and there he prayed.

cnv.text: 次日凌晨，天還沒有亮，耶穌起身出去，來到荒野的地方，在那裡禱告。

ccb.text: 第二天清早，天还没亮，耶稣就起来独自走到旷野去祷告。

csbs.text: 大清早，天还没亮，耶稣就起来，走出去，到一个荒僻的地方，在那里祷告。
